self_care: She wants her bed to feel fresh before sleep.
She wants a small nighttime ritual that makes her room feel calmer.
She wants bedding to smell clean between laundry days.

selling_points: Refreshes bedding, pillows, curtains, and fabric surfaces.
Perfect for bedtime routines and guest room prep.
Makes the bedroom feel cleaner and more relaxing.
Simple ritual for a cozy night reset.
hooks: The tiny step that makes my bed feel hotel-level
Spray this before bed and thank me later
My bedroom reset takes 10 seconds now
If clean sheets had a shortcut, this would be it

video_templates.name: Bedtime Reset
